title: Timeline Builder
description: Drag historical events into the correct chronological order before time runs out.

title: History Links
description: Find the four groups of four related historical items before you run out of guesses.

title: Historical Map Challenge
description: Place empires, battles, and borders in the right spot on the map.

title: Artifact Match
description: Match artifacts, tools, and art to the civilizations that made them.

title: Government Builder
description: Set policy, spend your treasury on power-ups, and steer your nation through crises.

title: Cause & Effect
description: Chain historical causes to their effects before the clock runs out.

title: Spot the Anachronism
description: Find the object, idea, or phrase that doesn't belong in the scene.
